title: Milkdown plugin for capturing raw positions and break styles in markdown AST
purpose: Extends markdown AST nodes with raw position data and break style information to support precise rendering and editing of markdown content.
module_context: Exports a unified plugin that modifies mdast nodes with raw position data and break style markers, along with a Milkdown plugin wrapper.

steps.content: Convert the file content to a string for position slicing.
Process block-level nodes to capture trailing raw content.
Determine the break style for each break node.
Capture list item markers for list nodes.

methods.name: visit
methods.normalized_params: (tree: any, nodeType: string, visitor: (node: any) => void): void

steps.content: Traverse the AST to find nodes of the specified type.
Apply the visitor function to each matching node.

methods.name: visit
methods.normalized_params: (tree: any, visitor: (node: any, index: number, parent: any) => void): void

steps.content: Traverse the AST to find all nodes.
Apply the visitor function to each node with its index and parent.
Extract a substring from the source content using the provided start and end offsets.
Apply a regular expression pattern to match against the source content.
Test if a regular expression pattern matches against the source content.
Wrap the remark plugin with Milkdown's $remark utility.
Return the configured plugin with the name 'rawPositions'.
